summary: ZaloOaAdapter implements ChannelAdapter with retry/backoff and injectable transport; stock depletion alerts deliver via Zalo within PRD latency.

interfaceChanges.description: Zalo OA text message delivery; device_token carries Zalo user id

mappings.criterion: AC1 — Zalo OA adapter implements ChannelAdapter protocol
AC2 — Stock depletion warnings via Zalo within 2 minutes

recommendations: Set ZALO_OA_ACCESS_TOKEN in production and verify OA message template approval with Zalo.
